comment.body:
This morning the tariff deals would take 2-3 years to settle between China/US.

Also Trump was pulling out of public Ukraine talks including Europe, causing China to pounce on the first island chain blockade.

Now we have most likely a bottom in place, China and US are negotiating privately, with China lying, etc etc.

If China were to start a blockade, I highly doubt a bottom is in place with those implications.

Also saying the US is geared to handle a WW3 like they handled WW2 with their manufacturing base obliterated seems to be a bit misguided.

I’m confused as how to implement this into any sort of cohesive trading plan.

comment.body: I took the market wants down to be that the market overall does want down but her details about how it's being propped up with QE and some of the factors at play to stop an all out flush from happening were in place. I took the updates on geo to show that people will hav ego play ball here sooner than later as the risks are so big if they don't.
